hero.headline: Turn Any Repo Into a Product in 5 Minutes
hero.subheadline: AI-powered synthesis engine transforms repositories into deployable SaaS products. Based on BMAD methodology with 12 intelligent agents.

features.title: 6 Pillars of Product Synthesis
features.subtitle: Everything you need to ship faster

research.title: Intelligent Research
research.description: AST-parse repositories, extract tech stacks, analyze dependencies, check licenses automatically.

architect.title: C4 Architecture
architect.description: Generate production-ready C4 models, select optimal tech stacks, estimate risks before coding.

code.title: Cascading Code Generation
code.description: Multi-layer LLM routing from drafts to final code. $0.50 per synthesis run.

test.title: Auto Testing
test.description: pytest unit tests and Playwright E2E tests generated automatically. 80% coverage target.

deploy.title: One-Click Deploy
deploy.description: Deploy to Render, Fly.io, Docker, or Kubernetes with a single command.

memory.title: Graphiti Memory
memory.description: Persistent graph memory across synthesis runs. Reuse patterns, accelerate future builds.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale as you grow.
